creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
[2019-11-14 21:51:25] ERROR[100543]: res_rtp_asterisk.c:4552 int ast_rtcp_write(const void *): RTCP SR transmission error to xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx:54911, rtcp halted No buffer space available

This is an error we receive now very often on calls lastin approx 50 - 90 minutes ...

Just for the record. I'm sorry having not much time to address further aspects. I'll have more time in the next weeks to check for misconfigurations to ensure it is not a homebrewn problem. Since version asterisk13 we use the very same or nearly same configuration by keeping the ./asterik/xxxx.conf folder's content and swapping the Asterisk version.
